title: June Night
writer: Tora Nordström-Bonnier, Ragnar Hyltén-Cavallius, Per Lindberg
actors: Ingrid Bergman, Gunnar Sjöberg, Olof Widgren
plot: When Kerstin Norback is shot and gravely wounded by her lover, the trial causes a public scandal, forcing her to move to Stockholm under an assumed name. There she befriends a group of women and attempts to rebuild her life.
